nasb.text: The princes of Zoan have acted foolishly, The princes of Memphis are deluded; Those who are the cornerstone of her tribes Have led Egypt astray.

esv.text: The princes of Zoan have become fools, and the princes of Memphis are deluded; those who are the cornerstones of her tribes have made Egypt stagger.

cnv.text: 瑣安的領袖都變為愚昧， 挪弗的領袖都受了欺騙； 那些在埃及支派中作房角石的， 使埃及人走錯了路。

ccb.text: 琐安的首领愚昧， 挪弗的首领糊涂。 他们是埃及的房角石， 却把埃及人引入歧途。

csbs.text: 琐安的首领们愚昧， 挪弗的首领们被欺哄； 埃及众支派中当房角石的，使埃及人迷失。
